text: There is a sense of anticipation as I stand between transparent barriers and conceptual displays, caught at the threshold of a space devoted to research and reflection. The hum of technology and the surrounding text make me acutely aware of my own status as both observer and participant. I feel curiosity mixed with a subtle pressure, as if the very environment urges me to question not only the nature of innovation but also my presence within this arena—a stage for thought, for being seen, and for the gentle tension of possibility.
